evidence: "Whimsical storyline... Romance, tragedy, drama, and humor are all featured and favorably illuminated."
"excellent drama, in league with House of Cards...Tea Leoni is brilliant."
"Unpredictable! Love the character development, and story lines. Superb writing."
"The truth about LBJ, Nixon and others is sharper now with the view point of history."
"I am sad to see Don Draper finally fall from grace, but knew that it was bound to happen."
"You know it is coming, but still, you hate to see ol' Don slipping into total degradation..."
"Wonderful character development, unique story line, wonderful casting, excellent scripting..."
"Meryl Streep is fantastic in her portrayal."
"Shonda Rimes is a great storyteller, and is a master producer."
"Captivating story, excellent made for TV series!"
"This movie has quite a whimsical storyline... I appreciated the role played by Johnny Depp..."
"Just one of the best made for TV series. Captivating."
"I really appreciate the perspective of the producers of this series."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly drama and historical narratives, with a strong appreciation for character development and storytelling quality. They show a preference for complex narratives and high production values, indicating a taste for emotionally resonant and engaging content.
